news_app package

Submodules

news_app.asgi module

ASGI config for news_app project.

It exposes the ASGI callable as a module-level variable named application.

For more information on this file, see https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/5.2/howto/deployment/asgi/

news_app.settings module

Django settings for the News App project.

news_app.settings.env_flag(name, default=False)[source]

Interpret a truthy or falsy environment variable as bool.

news_app.urls module

URL configuration for the News Application project.

news_app.wsgi module

WSGI config for news_app project.

It exposes the WSGI callable as a module-level variable named application.

For more information on this file, see https://docs.djangoproject.com/en/5.2/howto/deployment/wsgi/

Module contents

Project package for the News App Django site.
